MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANT TAYLOR STITCH, INC.'s MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Defendant Taylor Stitch, Inc.'s Motion to Admit Counsel Pro Hac Vice, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Good cause appearing, counsel James E. Gallagher may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action
